data.title: Bitcoin liquidation cascade wipes out $646 million in 24 hours
data.description:
Bitcoin’s drawdown to $115,300 punished the aggressive long leverage piled up in the market. BTC dropped from $117,786 at yesterday’s open to $115,353 in the early hours today, a 2. 1 % slide that masked a deeper intraday swing of about $4,350 between high and low
source: https://cryptoslate.com/insights/bitcoin-liquidation-cascade-wipes-out-646-million-in-24-hours/

data.title: Crypto Companies Intensify Use of PIPE and ATM Financing Amid Expansion
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, the recent surge in expansion and cryptocurrency acquisition by publicly listed companies has led to a widespread adoption of PIPE (Private Investment in Public Equity) and ATM (At-the-Market Offering) financing methods. These strategies are being utilized by crypto-related stocks and companies with crypto asset reserves to ensure continuous acquisition of digital assets from the market.

The frequent use of these financing methods can have a direct and significant impact on shares outstanding and shareholder value, particularly in the short term. This may result in dilution pressure and stock price volatility. Traditional stock market data platforms are slow to update new shares and market capitalization, often taking several days, and currently lack complete and accurate real-time data.

To assist readers in staying updated with the market, BlockBeats will continue to track the additional shares issued by popular crypto-related companies during financing activities. They will manually calculate each company's market capitalization and crypto asset holdings, providing a more precise basic mNAV value for reference.

The data on the market capitalization and premium rates of crypto-related companies is current as of July 25.

data.title: BTC Short Position Yields Significant Profit for Whale Trader
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, a prominent contract trader known as 'Set 10 Big Goals First' has reported substantial gains from a recent Bitcoin short position. The trader revealed on social media that the position, opened on July 23, has generated over $8.5 million in floating profit within two days, achieving a return rate of 24.47%.

Previous data indicated that the trader's short position involved 1,817 BTC, with the position valued at $217 million at the time of opening. The entry price for the position was $119,425.

data.title: Bitcoin(BTC) Drops Below 115,000 USDT with a 2.88% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On Jul 25, 2025, 07:53 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has dropped below 115,000 USDT and is now trading at 114,826.570313 USDT, with a narrowed 2.88% decrease in 24 hours.

data.title: CryptoQuant Analyst Predicts Profit-Taking Waves Amid Market Trends
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, CryptoQuant analyst Axel shared insights on social media, highlighting that realized net profit and loss charts indicate a clear pattern of profit-taking peaks during price surges. Before a significant market correction occurs, one or two more waves of profit-taking are likely.

Each wave of profit-taking is expected to be accompanied by short-term pullbacks and consolidation. However, as long as the realized net profit peaks do not exceed previous highs or are of similar scale, the bullish trend is expected to remain intact. Ideally, these healthy corrections will help cool down the market from an overheated state, thereby sustaining the upward trend.

data.title: Why Ki Young Ju Say “Bitcoin Cycle Theory Is Dead”
data.description:
Ki Young Ju, CEO of CryptoQuant and a prominent figure in crypto analysis, has publicly declared that the traditional Bitcoin cycle theory is no longer valid. This bold statement also serves as his admission that his previous predictions are now outdated. It reflects a profound shift in the market’s nature compared to the past. Why Has the Traditional Cycle Theory Collapsed? Ki Young Ju’s earlier Bitcoin cycle theory was built on two pillars: buying when whales accumulate and selling when retail investors enter
source: https://beincrypto.com/why-ki-young-ju-say-bitcoin-cycle-theory-is-dead/

data.title: CryptoQuant CEO declares Bitcoin cycle theory “dead” after major prediction miss
data.description:
25-7-2025 – CryptoQuant founder Ki Young Ju has publicly declared the traditional “Bitcoin cycle theory” obsolete and issued a rare apology for his widely-criticized April prediction that the bull market had ended, a call that cost followers potential gains of 54%. Ju’s controversial April assessment argued that Bitcoin had entered a bear market near $80,000, [. .
source: https://www.cointrackdaily.com/cryptoquant-ceo-declares-bitcoin-cycle-theory-dead-after-major-prediction-miss/

data.title: Robert Kiyosaki Recommends Gold, Silver, and Bitcoin ETFs for Convenient Investment
data.description: According to PANews, Robert Kiyosaki, author of 'Rich Dad Poor Dad,' has advised ordinary investors to consider gold, silver, and Bitcoin ETFs due to their convenience in investment. However, he cautions that ETFs are merely 'paper versions' of assets, akin to using a picture of a gun for self-defense, whereas physical assets offer greater security. Kiyosaki suggests holding physical gold, silver, and Bitcoin when appropriate, while understanding when to opt for physical assets versus ETFs to ensure a more stable investment strategy.
